turns.content: Starting the new year with the same old habits I guess — had pizza and burgers for dinner three times this week.
No judgment! Do you have any dietary goals for the year?
I should probably eat better but I have not made any changes yet.
Small steps help. Even adding one vegetable a day makes a difference.
I decided to try a vegetarian diet for March. No meat at all this month.
That is a great experiment! How are you finding it so far?
Harder than expected honestly. I miss chicken but the variety of vegetarian food surprised me.
Lots of people find the variety expands once they start exploring plant-based cooking.
Still going strong on the plant-based path — I have officially given up all meat now, not just for a month.
That is a significant commitment. What made you decide to make it permanent?
A documentary I watched about factory farming. Could not go back after seeing that.
Many people cite that as a turning point. How are you feeling health-wise?
I went fully vegan in July — no dairy or eggs either now. Feeling really good about it.
Going fully vegan is a major lifestyle shift. Are you finding it manageable day-to-day?
It was tough at restaurants at first but most places have vegan options now.
The variety of vegan options has improved dramatically in recent years.
